goal: Enhance paper trading to better simulate real market conditions, support learning, and improve buy/sell decisions. DEMO ONLY — no real brokers.

features.name: Maximum Drawdown (MDD) calculation
features.description: Calculate maximum drawdown from portfolio equity curve. Track peak equity, current drawdown, and worst historical drawdown. Store in portfolio summary. MDD = (peak - trough) / peak. Update after every portfolio evaluation cycle.
features.scope: backend/app/portfolio/ — add MDD tracking to portfolio evaluation, expose via API
features.marketpulse_has: basic risk_metrics endpoint exists but no MDD

features.name: Sharpe Ratio calculation
features.description: Calculate annualized Sharpe ratio from portfolio daily returns. Sharpe = (mean_return - risk_free_rate) / std_return * sqrt(252). Use portfolio transaction history to derive daily returns. Risk-free rate = 0.04 (configurable).
features.scope: backend/app/portfolio/risk_metrics.py — add sharpe calculation from closed positions

features.name: Profit Factor & Win Rate metrics
features.description: Profit Factor = gross_profit / gross_loss. Win Rate = winning_trades / total_trades. Calculate from closed PortfolioPositions. Also add avg_win, avg_loss, largest_win, largest_loss, avg_hold_time.
features.marketpulse_has: no profit factor or detailed win stats

features.name: Risk Metrics Dashboard in Frontend
features.description: Add risk metrics section to PortfolioView.vue showing MDD, Sharpe, Profit Factor, Win Rate, avg win/loss, best/worst trade. Use existing /portfolio/risk-metrics endpoint. Color-coded: green for good, red for bad.

features.name: Backtest engine core — simulate strategy on historical data
features.description: Create backend/app/backtest/engine.py with a BacktestEngine class that: (1) loads historical price_bars for a given asset+interval+date range, (2) iterates bar-by-bar simulating the recommendation scoring + portfolio entry/exit logic, (3) tracks simulated positions, equity curve, and trades. Pure Python, no DB writes. Returns BacktestResult dataclass with: trades list, equity_curve, total_return, max_drawdown, sharpe_ratio, win_rate.
features.scope: backend/app/backtest/engine.py — new module with pure simulation logic

features.name: Backtest API endpoint
features.description: Add POST /api/v1/backtest/run endpoint that accepts: asset_id, interval, start_date, end_date, strategy_profile. Calls BacktestEngine, returns results as JSON. Rate-limit to 1 concurrent backtest. Add GET /api/v1/backtest/results for saved results.

features.name: Backtest View in Frontend
features.description: New BacktestView.vue — form to select asset, date range, profile. Shows results: equity curve (CSS bars), trade list, metrics (return, MDD, Sharpe, win rate). Add to router and nav.

features.name: DCA Engine — Dollar Cost Averaging for losing positions
features.description: When open position drops X% from entry, buy additional tranche to lower average entry. Config per profile: max_tranches (2-3), tranche_size_pct (40-50% of original), price_drop_trigger (-5%), min_interval_hours (6-8). Store DCA state in exit_context JSONB. Update entry_price to weighted average after each DCA buy. No DB migrations needed.

features.name: Position Scaling Up — add to winning positions
features.description: When position is profitable by X% AND recommendation still active, allow adding a scale-up tranche. Max 1 scale-up per position. Tranche = 50% of original size. Updates quantity and average entry. Requires strong signal confirmation (score > 70).

features.name: Automatic regime-based strategy switching (enhanced)
features.description: Enhance existing auto_switch: when regime changes (detected via ADX + price trend + anomaly ratio), automatically apply the new profile's parameters to ALL new evaluations. Log profile switches as events. Add STRATEGY_AUTO_SWITCH=true to config. Frontend shows switch history.
features.scope: backend/app/strategy/service.py — enhance auto_select_profile to actually apply
features.marketpulse_has: auto_switch exists but only recommends, does not apply

features.name: Multi-timeframe indicator calculation
features.description: Extend get_indicators() to accept multiple intervals (e.g. ['5m','1h','4h','1d']). For each interval, compute RSI, MACD, ADX. Return dict keyed by interval. Requires ingesting data at multiple intervals — reuse existing ingestion with interval param.

features.name: Multi-timeframe signal confluence scoring
features.description: Create confluence score: if RSI oversold on BOTH 1h and 4h = strong buy signal. If only 1h = weak. Add mtf_confluence_score to recommendation scoring with weight 0.15. Signals align across timeframes = higher confidence.

features.name: Multi-timeframe indicator tabs in Asset Detail
features.description: Add timeframe selector tabs (5m, 1h, 4h, 1d) in AssetDetailView.vue. Each tab shows indicators for that interval. Highlight confluence (all green = aligned bullish, all red = aligned bearish).

features.name: Daily drawdown circuit breaker
features.description: Track daily portfolio drawdown. If equity drops more than X% from day's opening equity (default 5%), halt ALL new entries for remainder of day. Log as protection event. Resume next trading day. Configurable via DAILY_DRAWDOWN_LIMIT_PCT.
features.marketpulse_has: consecutive SL protection exists but no daily drawdown limit

features.name: Market-wide circuit breaker
features.description: If >60% of monitored assets drop >3% in 1 hour, activate circuit breaker: close all open positions and halt trading for 2 hours. Detect via anomaly ratio and top mover data. Log as critical protection event.

features.name: Safety status in Dashboard
features.description: Show active protections, circuit breaker status, daily drawdown gauge (green/yellow/red), and consecutive SL count in DashboardView. Pull from /portfolio/protections and /portfolio/risk-metrics.

features.name: Rich entry/exit decision logging
features.description: Enhance portfolio entry/exit logging: for each decision, store full signal breakdown (RSI value, MACD state, ADX strength, StochRSI, score components), trailing params used, regime at time, protections checked. Store in entry_decisions table or JSONB column.
features.marketpulse_has: basic decision logging exists but lacks signal detail

features.name: Decision Analysis view in Frontend
features.description: Expand Portfolio entry-decisions section: show each decision with signal breakdown bars (visual), indicator values at time of decision, protection checks passed/failed, trailing config used. Filterable by asset, date, decision type.

features.name: RSS news feed + basic sentiment classifier
features.description: Fetch headlines from public crypto/stock RSS feeds (CoinDesk, Yahoo Finance RSS). Simple keyword-based sentiment: positive words (+1), negative words (-1), neutral (0). Aggregate per-asset sentiment score. Store as signal. No external AI API needed — pure keyword matching.
features.scope: backend/app/sentiment/ — new module with RSS fetcher + classifier

features.name: Integrate sentiment into recommendation scoring
features.description: Add sentiment_score as 10th signal in recommendation scoring with weight 0.08. Positive sentiment boosts buy signals, negative boosts avoid. Only applied when sentiment data is available (graceful degradation).
